title: Resolution Authorizing the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw in Behalf of the Municipal Government of Los Baños to Enter Into a Memorandum of Agreement MOA) / Contract with the Philippine Long Distance Telephone Company (PLDT) Enterprise for Internet Upgrading Inclusive of All Its Offices and Ratifying the Same Thereafter. (AUTHOR : COUNCILOR JANOS S. LAPIZ, 12/14/2020)
